story.title: COVID-19 Oral History Interview with David Pate A
story.description: The interview covers Dr. David Pate's experiences and insights as part of Idaho's response to the COVID-19 pandemic. As the former CEO of St. Luke's Health System, Pate discusses his involvement with Governor Little's Coronavirus Work Group and the challenges of managing a public health crisis. Topics include the initial lack of information about COVID-19, testing and data reporting issues, school closures and the transition to in-person learning, and the vaccine rollout in Idaho. Pate emphasizes the importance of public health measures, the complexities of healthcare administration, and the role of misinformation in the public's response. Throughout, he reflects on the dedication of healthcare professionals and the need to prepare for future pandemics.
